chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1087 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.4903/2021 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 22.11.2022 Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents / SMC Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> None present for the petitioner. It appears that earlier on four dates of hearing, the petitioner and his Counsel failed to make their appearance before this Court when the matter was fixed for hearing. Through instant petition, the petitioner, inter-alia, seeks regularization of his service in Sukkur Municipal Corporation, Sukkur where he served as Sanitary Worker on daily wages basis against disabled quota. The respondent 2 to 4 have filed their joint comments stating therein that Sindh Local Government Act, 2013 as well as Sindh Local Council Employees Rules, 2017 does not provide any provision for regularization of services of any employee appointed on contract basis or daily wages basis. Even otherwise an employee of contract basis or daily wages has no vested right for regularization of his service, hence, this petition being devoid of merits is dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
